product_overview: DeadlineOS is a zero-dependency, browser-based productivity OS that combines task management, an AI Commander (Claude Sonnet), focus timers, gamified analytics and team profiles — all stored locally with an optional demo mode. Open the HTML file and use the app immediately with no signup required.
core_goals: Provide an all-in-one, zero-setup productivity workspace that runs entirely in the browser
Use AI (Anthropic Claude Sonnet) to analyze tasks, deadlines, mood and energy to produce prioritized action plans
Offer private, local-only storage (localStorage) and a no-key demo mode so users can try features without an API key
Gamify productivity with XP, levels, streaks and analytics to motivate consistent progress
Support quick collaboration-like workflows via PIN-protected team profiles and local @mentions

features.name: Landing Page Navigation
features.description: Marketing landing page that introduces DeadlineOS and links to the main app, demo and informational pages.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View hero section with product headline and CTA buttons -> Click "Launch App" to go to main application -> See /deadlineos-v3.html load
Navigate to / -> Click "Try Demo" -> Be taken to /dos-demo.html -> Click Start Demo -> See demo UI with pre-filled sample data
Navigate to / -> Click Features in top navigation -> Load /dos-features.html -> View features section with feature cards
Navigate to / -> Click Pricing -> Load /dos-pricing.html -> View pricing plans and FAQ
Navigate to / -> Click Roadmap -> Load /dos-roadmap.html -> View roadmap timeline
Navigate to / -> Click Compare -> Load /dos-compare.html -> View competitor comparison
Navigate to / -> Click Privacy -> Load /privacy.html -> View privacy policy
Navigate to / -> Click Launch App -> On slow connection see fallback static content -> See 404 if file missing

features.name: Task Management
features.description: Create, edit, delete, complete and organize tasks with priorities, deadlines, assignees and drag-and-drop reordering.
user_flows: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Tasks tab to open task panel -> Click Add Task button -> Fill in task title -> Fill in deadline -> Select priority -> Click Save to create task -> See new task appear in list
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Tasks tab -> Click edit icon on a task -> Change title and deadline -> Click Save -> See task details update
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Tasks tab -> Click task checkbox to mark complete -> See task marked complete and XP awarded
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Tasks tab -> Click delete icon on a task -> Confirm delete -> See task removed and XP clawback if uncompleted
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Tasks tab -> Drag and drop a task to reorder list -> See tasks reorder immediately
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Tasks tab -> Click Add Task button -> Leave title empty -> Click Save -> See validation error prompting for a title
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Tasks tab -> Add task with past deadline -> Click Save -> See overdue warning and task flagged as overdue

features.name: AI Commander Chat
features.description: Chat interface powered by Claude Sonnet for AI-assisted task analysis, recommendations, crisis detection and multi-turn conversation.
user_flows: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click AI Commander tab -> Enter API key in settings -> Type message in chat input field -> Click Send -> View AI response in chat window
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click AI Commander tab -> Type 'analyze my tasks' in chat input -> Click Send -> Click AI Analysis button -> View prioritized action plan returned by AI

Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click AI Commander tab -> Do not enter API key -> Type message in chat input field -> Click Send -> See banner warning about missing API key -> See mock response shown instead of live API response
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click AI Commander tab -> Enter API key -> Type message -> Click Send -> Encounter network error -> See error message advising to check API key and network

features.name: Focus Timer
features.description: Pomodoro and Deep Work focus timer with start/pause/reset controls, session tracking and completed session XP rewards.
user_flows: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Timer tab -> Select Pomodoro mode -> Click Start button to begin timer countdown -> View countdown and SVG animation -> Complete session -> See session count increment and XP awarded
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Timer tab -> Select Deep Work mode -> Click Start -> Click Pause -> See timer pause state -> Click Reset -> See timer reset to initial value
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Timer tab -> Click Start without selecting a mode -> See validation prompt to choose Pomodoro or Deep Work

Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Timer tab -> Start timer -> Switch browser tab -> Return and find timer stopped due to page visibility restrictions -> See guidance to keep tab open or use notifications

features.name: Analytics and XP System
features.description: Gamified productivity tracking showing XP, levels, achievements, streaks and a 14-day sparkline of activity.
user_flows: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Analytics tab -> View XP bar and current level -> See earned achievement badges and streak counter
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Analytics tab -> Complete tasks over several days -> View 14-day activity sparkline update and streak increase
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Analytics tab -> Create and complete tasks repeatedly to attempt XP exploit -> System enforces completeXpGranted flag -> See no duplicate XP awarded
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Analytics tab -> View level cap exceeded locally -> See level capped at max value and UI shows cap warning

features.name: Notes
features.description: Create, edit, delete notes and use AI to summarize notes or extract tasks into the task list.
user_flows: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Notes tab -> Click New Note button -> Type note title -> Type note content -> Click Save Note -> See note appear in notes list
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Notes tab -> Open a saved note -> Click AI Summarize -> Enter API key if required -> Click Send -> View AI-generated summary
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Notes tab -> Open a note -> Click Extract Tasks -> See extracted tasks created in Tasks tab
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Notes tab -> Click AI Summarize without API key -> See mock summary returned with demo content

features.name: Team Profiles
features.description: Create PIN-protected team profiles, switch between profiles, assign tasks with @mentions and view a local leaderboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Team tab -> Click Create Profile -> Enter name and select avatar -> Enter optional PIN -> Click Save -> See new profile appear in profile list
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Team tab -> Switch between profiles -> Select a profile -> See app context switch to selected profile and leaderboard update
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Team tab -> Lock a profile with PIN -> Attempt to access protected profile -> Enter PIN -> Gain access to profile
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Team tab -> Add @mention to a task -> Assign task to profile -> See assignment reflected in task details and leaderboard XP
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Team tab -> Try to access PIN-protected profile with wrong PIN -> See authentication error and remain blocked

features.name: Daily Plan
features.description: AI-generated hourly schedule (8am–6pm) that maps tasks into time slots based on priority, deadlines and user energy.
user_flows: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Plan tab -> Click Generate Plan button -> Enter API key if required -> View AI-generated hourly schedule with tasks mapped to time slots
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Plan tab -> Click Generate Plan while in demo mode -> See mock plan generated from pre-populated demo tasks
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Plan tab -> Click Generate Plan without API key and with no tasks -> See validation message requesting at least one task to generate a plan
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click Plan tab -> Click Generate Plan -> Encounter network/API error -> See helpful error message and fallback suggestion to try demo mode

features.name: Theme Switching
features.description: Switch between four visual themes (Default, Forest, Ember, Ice) with immediate UI color updates.
user_flows: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click theme switcher button in topbar -> Select Forest theme -> UI colors update immediately to Forest palette
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click theme switcher button -> Select Ember theme -> See Ember theme applied and persisted in localStorage
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click theme switcher button -> Select Ice theme -> Browser does not support CSS variables -> See fallback default theme and message informing user

features.name: Demo Mode
features.description: One-click demo with pre-filled realistic tasks, notes and profiles that works without an API key and uses built-in mock AI responses.
user_flows: Navigate to /dos-demo.html -> Click Start Demo button -> Be taken to /deadlineos-v3.html with demo flag -> See pre-populated tasks, notes and profiles
Navigate to /dos-demo.html -> Click Auto-Demo Start -> Watch 10-second walkthrough animation play and demo tasks update automatically
Navigate to /dos-demo.html -> Click Start Demo -> Interact with AI Commander without entering API key -> See mock AI responses used for analysis and chat
Navigate to /dos-demo.html -> Click Start Demo -> Enter API key in demo session -> See app attempt to use live API but fallback to mock responses if key invalid -> See error banner about API key

features.name: Language Switching
features.description: Interface supports English and German with auto-detection and manual toggle in the topbar.
user_flows: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> On first load auto-detect browser language as German -> UI labels and text display in German
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click language toggle in topbar -> Select EN -> UI labels and text update to English immediately

Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click language toggle -> Select DE -> Some legacy strings missing translation -> See fallback to English for untranslated strings and a notice to report missing translations

features.name: Mood and Energy Tracker
features.description: Quick status bar to record current mood and energy levels which factor into AI analysis and crisis detection.
user_flows: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click mood emoji button in status bar -> Select 'Neutral' mood -> See mood indicator update
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click energy level selector in status bar -> Select energy level 6/8 -> See energy value saved and included in next AI Analysis
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Set low mood and low energy -> Click AI Analysis -> See AI include burnout caution and adjusted plan in response
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click mood emoji -> Rapidly change mood multiple times -> localStorage quota exceeded -> See toast error instructing user to clear space or reduce stored history

tech_stack.other: Anthropic Claude API (claude-sonnet-4-20250514), localStorage, Web APIs

routes.description: Marketing landing page with hero, features, testimonials, FAQ and navigation to app
Main all-in-one app with Tasks, AI Commander, Timer, Analytics, Notes, Team, Integrations and Plan tabs
Demo mode page with pre-filled sample data, no API key required
Features overview page listing all DeadlineOS capabilities
V1 to V5 product roadmap page
Comparison page vs. competitors (Notion, Todoist, etc.)

features.name: Landing Page Navigation

Click "Launch App" to go to main application
Click "Try Demo" to go to demo mode
Click navigation links (Features, Pricing, Roadmap, Compare, Privacy)
View features section with feature cards
View testimonials section
View FAQ accordion items

features.name: Task Management
features.description: Create, edit, delete, complete and organize tasks with priorities, deadlines and drag-and-drop reordering

Fill in task title, deadline and priority

Click task checkbox to mark complete
Click edit icon to edit task details

Filter tasks by All, Today, Priority

known_limitations.issue: AI features require valid Anthropic API key; without it only demo/mock responses are shown
known_limitations.impact: AI Commander, AI Analysis, Note Summarization, and Plan Generation show mock data without API key

known_limitations.issue: All data stored in localStorage only; no cloud sync or backend
known_limitations.impact: Data is browser-specific and lost if localStorage is cleared

known_limitations.issue: Demo mode uses hardcoded mock AI responses, not real Claude API
known_limitations.impact: AI responses in demo are pre-scripted and not dynamic
